report.title: Report a hazard
report.subtitle: One tap immediately sends the report to your current GPS position.

popup.offlineVote: Couldn't send your response, try again later

route.gpsRequired: GPS position required to compute a route.
route.serviceUnavailable: Routing service unavailable, try again shortly

generator.generateFailed: Couldn't generate a ride in that direction
generator.gpsRequiredDiscovery: GPS position required to suggest rides.

navigation.recalcOffline: Recalculation unavailable offline — the original route is still active.

instructions.endOfRoad: At the end of the road

roadbooks.title: Roadbooks
roadbooks.noRouteWarning: No active route: the roadbook will be saved without a track.

convoy.title: Convoy
convoy.leaveDesc: You will no longer see other members' positions.
convoy.rideTogetherDesc: See other members' positions and exchange quick reactions.
convoy.loginRequiredCreate: You must be signed in to create a convoy
convoy.loginRequiredJoin: You must be signed in to join a convoy
convoy.createdButNotAdded: Convoy created, but couldn't add you to it

profile.noTrips: No trips recorded yet. Your future rides will appear here.

contacts.crashDetectionDesc: Experimental detection using phone sensors. Does not replace calling emergency services if you can do it yourself.
contacts.vibrationsDesc: Haptic feedback on taps, hazard alerts and quick convoy actions. Has no effect if the device doesn't support vibration (iOS Safari).
contacts.deleteDesc: This person will no longer be alerted if a crash is detected.

settings.title: Settings
settings.autoRecenterDesc: Continuously follows your position while driving.
settings.soundAlertsDesc: Short beep when approaching a zone.
settings.vibrationDesc: Vibration when approaching a hazard zone.
settings.motoModeDesc: Report types and alerts tailored for riders.
settings.deleteConfirm1: This action is permanent and deletes all your data (contacts, trips, roadbooks). Confirm?
settings.deleteConfirm2: Final confirmation. Your account will be deleted immediately.

auth.subtitle: Report and avoid hazard zones in real time.
auth.toSignin: Already have an account? Sign in

geoError.title: Location required
geoError.denied: Access to your location was denied. Allow geolocation in your browser settings (padlock icon in the address bar), then retry.
geoError.unsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation. Try a recent Chrome, Safari or Firefox.
geoError.unavailable: GPS position temporarily unavailable. Check that GPS is enabled.

crash.title: Crash detected
crash.noContacts: No emergency contacts saved. Add some in Profile.

landing.heroTitle1: The only copilot that truly protects
landing.heroSub: Real-time hazard alerts, convoy mode, and a price that never quietly creeps up. For cars and motorcycles.
landing.icpTitle: One app, two worlds riding together
landing.icpSub: Designed from day one for both cars and motorcycles. Not a car product with paint slapped on.
landing.forYouIf: This app is for you if:
driverPoints: You drive every day and are tired of paying more and more for Coyote
You want official speed cameras + community reports in one place
You want to plan a trip and see hazards before leaving
You want an app that stays simple, no ads or useless bloat
riderPoints: You ride with gloves and helmet — no time to pull out your phone at every alert
Wind noise drowns out sound: you want handlebar vibrations too
You ride regularly with a club or group and want live convoy tracking
You want alerts for gravel, potholes and tricky curves — not just speed cameras
landing.problemTitle: Today you juggle 3 apps and a WhatsApp group
before: Waze for speed cameras, Liberty Rider for safety, a WhatsApp group for the club.
A Coyote subscription that goes up every year without warning.
Car-first interface, nothing for motorcycle riding.
with: Everything in one app: cameras, safety, convoy.
Price guaranteed stable for 24 months. Zero nasty surprises.
Alerts and driving mode designed from day one for motorcycles.
landing.featuresSub: The basics of a great community navigation app, done better.

features.mapD: Community hazards reported and confirmed live.
features.routeD: Preview the number of hazards on your route before leaving.
features.navD: Automatic recalculation when you deviate, Waze/Google Maps style.
features.reportD: Camera, accident, roadwork, obstacle — two seconds, done.
features.repD: A system that filters false alerts and keeps the network trustworthy.

landing.motoSub: Seven features designed by a rider, for riders.

moto.nativeD: Gravel, pothole and low-visibility curve alerts.
moto.vibD: Useful with helmet and wind noise, on top of the sound cue.
moto.convD: See every club member's position on the map.
moto.leadD: Instant alert if a group member falls behind.
moto.stopD: One tap and the whole convoy is notified instantly.
moto.shareD: The track is sent to the whole group, not only the creator.
moto.sumD: Distance, duration, hazards, track — shared with everyone on arrival.

landing.compareSub: Everyone has their strengths. Here's where VIGLA stands out, without bashing anyone.
landing.pricingSub: No surprise hikes. No ads. No selling your data.
landing.guaranteeDesc: Free, no credit card. If Premium doesn't suit you in the first 14 days, we refund you in full, no questions asked.
landing.whyTitle: Three reasons that make the difference

why.d: The only one combining a discreet device, native rider alerts and real-time convoy mode.

why.t: Official cameras always up to date
why.d: Road Safety database synced automatically every week.
Not a generic car product patched later — motorcycle-first from the first line of code.

landing.ctaSub: Create your free account in under a minute.

seo.title: VIGLA — The copilot that truly protects riders
seo.description: Real-time hazard alerts, convoy mode, native rider alerts. Cars and motorcycles. Price guaranteed stable for 24 months.
seo.ogDescription: Official speed cameras, community alerts, convoy mode and exclusive rider features.

seo.appDescription: VIGLA — community app for road hazard alerts: speed cameras, accidents, roadwork, obstacles. Real time, mobile and dashboard.
seo.ogDescription: Report and avoid speed cameras, accidents, roadwork and obstacles in real time.

errors.pageDesc: Something went wrong on our end. Try refreshing or head back home.
errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

pwa.installSubtitle: Add VIGLA to your home screen for hands-free access.
pwa.installed: VIGLA is installed on this device.
pwa.iosSteps: Tap Safari's Share button, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.

push.title: Push notifications
push.description: Get convoy alerts even when the app is closed.
push.deniedHint: Allow notifications in your browser settings.
push.unsupported: Push notifications aren't supported on this browser.
push.previewBlocked: Not available in preview — try the published app.
